name: @bindtty/e2e
description: End-to-end tests for BindTTY (mock streams and real PTY).

scripts.build:deps: npm run build --workspace @bindtty/signal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/vnode && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/jsx-runtime && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/runtime && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/layout && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/renderer-terminal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/terminal && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/interaction && npm run build --workspace @bindtty/widgets && npm run build --workspace bindtty
scripts.build:real: npm run build:deps && tsc -p real/harness/tsconfig.json && tsc -p real/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: npm run build:mock && npm run build:real
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/mock/test/*.test.js && node --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-force-exit dist/real/test/*.test.js
